base_url.description: Notion API base URL override for tests or proxies. Defaults to https://api.notion.com/v1.

token.description: Notion integration token, sent as Bearer auth. Never logged.

max_pages.description: Optional hard cap on the number of pages read per stream, consumed by hooks/notion/hooks.go's StreamHook -- NOT a declarative streams.json field (pagination is entirely hook-driven since POST /search's body cursor has no declarative equivalent; see docs.md Known limits). Permissive parse: empty, "all", "unlimited", or any non-positive-integer string means unbounded.
